payload.title: Public website for the hosted hub: landing, features, docs, login
payload.description: The remote hub (scope-hub.fly.dev) currently auth-gates the root path — an anonymous visitor to / gets 401. Add a public-facing site served by the hub: a marketing landing page on /, feature pages, public documentation, and a sign-in entry that kicks off GitHub OIDC (from epic SCP-167). The authenticated kanban SPA moves behind auth. Public routes must be served WITHOUT the bearer/session gate; only the app + /api stay authenticated.
